visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with mirrors and metal objects, two men in dark suits flank a woman with white hair in a dark coat, all pointing wands forward. The camera then cuts to a man in a brown jacket standing among shelves and hanging glassware, looking forward with a neutral expression. The scene returns to the group as the woman extends her wand forward while the men keep their stance.
audio_description: A Mandarin voice speaks with a steady, determined tone. A questioning voice asks a question with a curious inflection, and a third voice replies in a measured manner.
